subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, thy services at the divine threshold are manifest and evident, and thy labors in the court of the All-Merciful are clear and visible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله خدماتت در درگاه الهی واضح و مشهود و زحماتت در بساط رحمانی آشکار
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
